output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?releaseDate WHERE {
  ?song rdfs:label "How Deep Is Your Love" @en .
  ?song wdt:P31 wd:Q372482 .
  ?song wdt:P175 wd:Q8554 .
  ?song wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
}
output.answer:
The song "How Deep Is Your Love" by the Bee Gees was released in 1977. The first SPARQL query that matched the song title via labels returned a release date of 1977-01-01, which aligns with the historical release of the song on the *Saturday Night Fever* soundtrack.

<answer>
The song "How Deep Is Your Love" by the Bee Gees was released on January 1, 1977.
</answer>
